## Description
What does this PR do? Please include a summary of the changes and any related issues.

Fixes #(issue number)

## Type of change
- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to change)
- [ ] Documentation update

## How has this been tested?
Please describe the tests that you ran to verify your changes. Include any relevant details about test configuration.

## Checklist
- [ ] Type hints added/updated where applicable
- [ ] Docstrings added/updated
- [ ] No references to sentinel values or debug code
- [ ] Tests pass (if applicable)
- [ ] README or documentation updated (if needed)
- [ ] Code follows project style guidelines
